hero.description: A passionate software developer specializing in web development. I create modern and responsive websites using the latest technologies.

about.title: My Journey
about.description-1: My journey began with curiosity about how interfaces work and evolved into a deep interest in front-end architecture and best development practices.
about.description-2: Over time, I participated in academic and professional projects that allowed me to develop critical thinking, organization, and a results-driven mindset.
about.description-3: Today, I strive to build solutions that combine visual clarity, performance, and well-structured code.
about.whoami: Developer focused on modern front-end, passionate about well-crafted interfaces and intuitive experiences.
about.skills: React • TypeScript • Next.js • Tailwind CSS • Component Architecture • Responsive UI • API Integration
